title: C.V.
description:
KP

Kirsten Palz has lived in Copenhagen, NYC, Rotterdam and lives in Berlin since 2001.

Topics

  • Language, Anthropocene environments, machine-code
  • AI, robotics, data, programming
  • Post-human aesthetics
  • Generative music plus image
  • Collapsing eco-system and death

Production

  • Studio-based production with collaborators.

Artist Collectives

  • ACTA with Tatiana Echeverri Fernandez
  • Founder of independent space: 'Le Foyer du Château'

Artist Collaborations Include

  • Catherine Christer Hennix
  • Yona Friedman
  • Paul Polaris
  • Erik Steinbrecher
  • Kurd Alsleben and Antje Eske
  • Norbert Palz

Group-Shows (Selection)

  • 2025 Europa ohne Ende Spor Klübü, Berlin.
  • 2025 Landscapes of Futures Past, Jia Yuan Hai Museum, Shanghai.
  • 2025 L'Age d'Or, The National Museum, Berlin.
  • 2024 Close to the Edge, Spor Klübü, Berlin.
  • 2023 The Last Laugh. Nationalmuseum, Berlin.
  • 2023 Micrologies. The Gregory Allicar Museum of Art, Colorado State University.
  • 2022 Blind Vision, Wilhelminenhofstr. Berlin.

Publications and Editions (Selection)

  • 2025 Chronicle of Extinction. Void 25-26. Edition.
  • 2025 Concrete Beach, Sculpture as Writing. Paris
  • 2024 Substances / Edition 24 Flugblätter
  • 2023 Songbook / Nunca más la guerra. Un lamento. Edition.

Grants (Selection)

  • 2024 Statens Kunstfond. Arbeitsstipendium.
  • 2022 Stiftung Kunstfond. Neustart Kultur.
  • 2021 Berlin Senate Research Stipendium.
  • 2020 Statens Kunstfond. Produktionsstipendium.
